summary: July 2021 Cavallo newsletter covering a planned donkey farrier documentary with Megan Hensley and a customer Q&A on treating a stubborn hoof abscess using Cavallo boots.
March 2022 Cavallo newsletter featuring donkey trimmer Megan Hensley's low-restraint hoof care approach, her online donkey hoof course, and Tender Little Hearts equine-assisted services.
March 2023 Cavallo newsletter on Cavallo CLB boots appearing on a support donkey at the Oscars (Banshees of Inisherin) and the launch of a customer referral cash-reward program.
Nov/Dec 2022 Cavallo newsletter promoting gift cards, the story of Patrick the Pony elected mayor of Cockington, and Megan Hensley showing LEB long-ear donkey boots at the Donkey Welfare Symposium.
October 2022 Cavallo newsletter featuring a Halloween photo contest to win Trek Boots, a chat with DVM Tomas Teskey, and a PHCP holistic hoof care conference recap.
Explains Cavallo's Donations and Sponsorships program supporting horse rescues, equine therapy centres, and equestrian groups with product donations, discounts, and prizes.
Endorsement page where Monty Roberts praises Cavallo Total Comfort System saddle pads and Carole Herder's book 'There Are No Horseshoes in Heaven', including a video.
Email signup confirmation page welcoming new subscribers to the Cavallo Community and prompting them to confirm their subscription and start shopping.
Email-gated landing page for the 'BARE Facts' download, explaining the physiological case for barefoot (unshod) horses and how the hoof functions without shoes.
Email-gated landing page offering a free Cavallo Barefoot Trim manual and video by trimmer Lynn Seeley, with a customer testimonial about learning to trim.
Standalone page embedding a Cavallo barefoot trim YouTube video with no surrounding text.
Book bonus page for Carole Herder's 'There Are No Horseshoes in Heaven' offering three educational webinar videos with Dr. Tomas Teskey and Monty Roberts on hoof health and barefoot care.
